tooltips.espoDentalReminderHoursBefore: Hours before the appointment when first reminder is sent
tooltips.espoDentalReminderWindowMinutes: Allowed drift from the target moment
tooltips.espoDentalDefaultClinic: If set, new preliminary patients get this clinic automatically. If empty and only one active clinic exists, it will be used automatically.
tooltips.espoDentalPaymentMethods: JSON array of objects like {"id":"cash","label":"Cash"}. These values populate the payment method dropdown.
tooltips.espoDentalToothChartConditions: JSON array of objects like {"id":"caries","label":"Caries","color":"#c83e58"}. These values populate tooth surface condition dropdowns.
tooltips.espoDentalToothChartSurfaces: JSON array of objects like {"key":"o","label":"Occlusal"}. Keys o, m, d, b, l are used in stored tooth-chart data.
